description: Send notifications to your own PopcornNotify destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise popcorn:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a PopcornNotify notify form payload and post it to api.popcornnotify.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-popcornnotify

request.template: {"urls":"popcorn://${ customer_secrets.POPCORNNOTIFY_APIKEY }/${ customer_secrets.POPCORNNOTIFY_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"popcorn://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&recipients=${ customer_secrets.POPCORNNOTIFY_RECIPIENTS }
message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&recipients=${ customer_secrets.POPCORNNOTIFY_RECIPIENTS }
